title: Proclamation No. 566, s. 1940
text:
MALACAÑAN PALACE MANILA

PROCLAMATION NO. 566

AMENDING PROCLAMATION NUMBERED FOUR HUNDRED ELEVEN SERIES OF NINETEEN HUNDRED AND THIRTY-ONE, ESTABLISHING THE LOPEZ WATERSHED FOREST RESERVE.

Upon recommendation of the Director of Forestry, approved by the Secretary of Agriculture and Commerce, and pursuant to the provisions of section eighteen hundred and twenty-six of Act Numbered Twenty-seven hundred and eleven, known as the Revised Administrative Code, I, Manuel L. Quezon, President of the Philippines, hereby amend Proclamation Numbered Four hundred and eleven, series of nineteen hundred and thirty-one, by changing the boundaries of the Lopez Watershed Forest Reserve, situated in the municipalities of Calauag and Guinayangan, Province of Tayabas, Island of Luzon, and described on Bureau of Forestry Map No. F. R. 29-1, to wit:

Beginning at corner 1, a danlig tree, 60 cm. in diam. r marked C. R. 1293/77, identical to corner 1, Lopez Watershed Reservation, Lopez, Tayabas (FR-29) which is S. 48°. about 3,200 meters from Barrio Yaganak, Calauag, Tayabas; thence following Suja Creek, upstream, about 420 meters to corner 2, a Terminalia sp., 60 cm. in diam., marked C. R. 1293/55, identical to corner 2, Lopez Watershed Reservation, Lopez, Tayabas (FR-29); thence N. 48° E., 100 meters to corner 3, a danlig tree, 50 cm. in diam., marked C. R. 1295/12, identical to corner 3, Lopez Watershed Reservation, Lopez, Tayabas (FR-29); thence N. 37° ., 40 meters to corner 4, an unknown tree, 60 cm. in diam., marked C. R. 1295/16, identical to corner 4, Lopez Watershed Reservation, Lopez, Tayabas (FR-29); thence N. 33° E., 170 meters to corner 5, a malangas tree, 30 cm. in diam., marked C. R. 1295/22, identical to corner 5, Lopez Watershed Reservation, Lopez, Tayabas (FR-29); thence N. 14° E„ 120 meters.to corner 6, a ligas tree, 20 cm. in diam., marked C. R. 1295/27, identical to corner 6, Lopez Watershed Reservation, Lopez, Tayabas (FR-29); thence N. 78° E., 80 meters to corner 7, a lanete tree, 20 cm. in diam., marked C. R. 1295/32 identical tocorner 7. Lopez Watershed Reservation, Lopez Tayabas (FR-29): thence N. 70° E., 180 meters to corner 8, a guijo tree, 50 cm. in diam., marked C. R, 1295/39, identical to corner 8, Lopez Watershed Reservation, Lopez, Tayabas (FR-29); thence S. 89° E., 120 meters to corner 9, a balobo tree, 20 cm. diam., marked C. R. 1295/45, identical to corner 9, Lopez Watershed Reservation, Lopez, Tayabas  (FR-29); thence N.34° E., 80 meters to corner 10, a balobo tree, 30 cm. in diam., marked C. R. 1295/48, identical to corner 10, Lopez Watershed Reservation, Lopez, Tayabas (FR-29); thence S. 61° E., 70 meters to corner 11, a tiga tree, 35 cm. in diam., marked C. R. 1295/49, identical to corner 11. Lopez Watershed Reservation, Lopez, Tayabas (FR-29); thence S. 30° E., 150 meters to corner 12. a bitanhol tree, 30 cm. in diam., marked C. R. 1280/46, identical to corner 12, Lopez Watershed Reservation, Lopez, Tayabas : thence S. 72° E., 180 meters to corner 13, an unknown tree. 35 cm. in diam., marked C. R. 1280/43, to corner 13, Lopez Watershed Reservation, as (FR-29); thence S. 61° E., 110 meters to corner 14, a makaasim tree, 18 cm. in diam., marked C. R.1280/41, identical to corner 14, Lopez Watershed Reservation, Lopez, Tayabas (FR-29) ; thence S. 37° E., 380 meters to corner 15, a guijo tree, 70 cm. in diam., marked C. R 1280/35, identical to corner 15, Lopez Watershed Reservation, Lopez, Tayabas (FR-29); thence S. 28° E., 60 meters to corner 16, a lanutan tree, 25 cm. in diam., marked 1840/59 on north side of trail; thence S. 73° E., 230 meters to corner 17, a bocboc tree, 40 cm. in diam., marked 1840/59, on level land; thence S. 23° E., 240 meters to corner 18, a white lauan tree, 40 cm. in diam., marked 1840/48, on level land; thence S. 55° E., 240 meters to corner 19, a bocboc tree, 40 cm-in diam., marked 1840/43, on bank of creek; thence S. 77° E., 260 meters to corner 20, a malapingan tree, 25 cm. in diam., marked 1840/40, on top of ridge; thence S. 65° E., 270 meters to corner 21, a balobo tree, 30 cm. in diam., marked 1840/35, on top ridge; thence S. 35° E., 250 meters to corner 22, an alakan tree, 20 cm. in diam., marked 1840/31, at source of dry creek; thence S. 28° E., 250 meters to corner 23, a bitanghol tree, 30 cm. in diam., marked 1840/27, on top of ridge; thence S. 10° E., 250 meters to corner 24, a balobo tree, 20 cm. in diam., marked 1840/24, on south side of trail; thence S. 9° E., 240 meters to corner 25, a bolongeta tree, 30 cm . in diam., marked 1840/20, on north side of trail; thence S. 47° W., 250 meters to corner 26, an Eugenia sp. tree, 40 cm. in diam., marked 1840/15, on north side of trail; thence S. 19° W., 250 meters to corner 27, a bolongeta tree, 20 cm. in diam., marked 1840/10, on north side of trail; thence S. 70° W., 220 meters to corner 28, an unknown tree, 60 cm. in diam., 1840/5, on south side of trail; thence S. 60° W., 260 meters to corner 29, a balobo tree, 40 cm. in diam., marked 1840/2, at the intersection of Amuguis River and trail; thence following Amuguis River downstream, in a northwesterly direction, about 500 meters to corner 30, a makaasim tree, 30 cm. in diam., marked 1940/53, on north bank of Amuguis River; thence following Amuguis River downstream, in westerly and northwesterly directions about 330 meters to corner 31, a makaasim tree, 45 cm. in diam., marked 1940/47, on northeast bank of Amuguis River; thence following Amuguis River downstream, in a northwesterly direction, about 390 meters to corner 32, a makaasim tree. 20 cm. in diam., marked 1940/41, on northeast bank of Amuguis River; thence following Amuguis River downstream, in a northwesterly direction, about 420 meters to comer 33 . a maniknik tree, 20 cm. in diam., marked 1940/33, on north bank of Amuguis River; thence following Amuguis River downstream, in southwesterly and northwesterly directions. about 360 meters to corner 34, a lisok tree, 30 cm. in diam,. marked 1940/22, on east bank of Amuguis River; thence following Amuguis River downstream in a northwesterly direction, about 200 meters to corner 35, a tanghas tree, 30 cm. in diam., marked 1940/18, on east bank of Amuguis River; thence following Amuguis River downstream, in a northwesterly direction, about 320 meters to corner 36, malugai tree, 40 cm. in diam., marked 1940/12, on northeast bank of Amuguis River; thence following Amuguis River downstream in a northwesterly direction, about 390 meters a haguimit tree, 20 cm. in diam., marked 1940/6, on northeast bank of Amuguis River; thence following Amuguis River, downstream, in westerly and northwesterly directions, about 130 meters to corner 38, an unknown tree, 60 cm. in diam., marked F. Z. 1056/7, identical to corner 35, alienable and disposable, Tayabas Project No. 11-D; thence N. 28° W.,250 meters to corner 39, a taluto tree, 40 cm. in diam., marked F. Z. 1055/76, identical to corner 34, alienable and disposable, Tayabas Project No. 11-D; thence N. 3° W., 370 meters to corner 40, a Banasi tree 30 cm. in diam., marked C. R. 1293/80, identical to corner 30, Lopez Watershed Reservation, Lopez, Tayabas; thence N. 3° W., 280 meters to corner 41, a liusin tree, 30 cm. in diam., marked C. R. 1293/78, identical to corner 31, Lopez Watershed Reservation, Lopez, Tayabas; and thence N. 3° W., 260 meters to corner 1, the point of beginning.

Corners 1 to 11, 40 and 41 were marked with official marking hatchet No. B. F. 467; corners 12 to 15, with B. F. 503; and corners 38 and 39, with B. F. 366.

Containing an area of 418.0000 hectares.

Amended in order to include in the original area embraced by this forest reserve the adjoining public forest containing an area of 215.38 hectares.

In witness whereof, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Commonwealth of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done at the City of Manila, this twenty-second day of June, in the year of Our Lord, nineteen hundred and forty, and of the Commonwealth of the Philippines, the fifth.

MANUEL L. QUEZON President of the Philippines

By the President: JORGE B. VARGAS Secretary to the President

Source: Presidential Museum and Library
